metadata.description: Email Recipients Configuration - Easy update system
metadata.notes: Update 'active_mode' to switch between test and production. Update recipient lists as DC users change.

production.description: Production mode - DC distribution lists and managers

recipients.name: DC District Manager - Region 1
recipients.notes: Add actual DC manager emails here

recipients.name: DC General Manager - Dallas
recipients.notes: Add actual DC manager emails here

recipients.name: Store Manager Distribution List
recipients.notes: Add store manager distribution list email here

production.instructions: Add DC and store manager emails in production section as needed

instructions.how_to_use: This file manages all email recipients. Update as needed and commit changes.
instructions.switch_mode: Change 'active_mode' from 'test' to 'production' to switch recipient lists
instructions.add_recipients: Add new recipients to the appropriate mode's 'recipients' array
instructions.deactivate_recipient: Set 'active': false to exclude a recipient without deleting them

format.name: Human readable name
format.active: true/false - whether to include in emails

early_production.how_to_transition:
1. Update recipient emails in production section
2. Set active_mode to 'production'
3. Test with one PayCycle
4. Expand gradually as comfortable

recipient_sources.dc_managers: Get from HRIS or ask DC leadership
recipient_sources.store_managers: May need distribution list from Talent/Store Ops
recipient_sources.distribution_lists: Ask for automated/shared mailbox lists if available
